name: GOLFTEC El Paso
address: 641 N Resler Dr #304, El Paso, TX 79912
about: GOLFTEC El Paso is a high-tech golf training facility that offers data-driven instruction and practice. It utilizes advanced technology such as OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise swing feedback and personalized coaching. The facility is designed for golfers looking to improve their game through structured lessons, on-course application, and custom club fitting services, offering a professional environment focused on measurable results.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION and launch monitors provides detailed swing analysis
Data-driven coaching creates personalized improvement plans for long-term progress
Custom club fitting services use launch monitors to optimize equipment for individual swings

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for lessons and fittings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and custom fitting services if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services, so it's recommended to inquire directly about outside food and beverage policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required for 18 holes is not specified, as GOLFTEC focuses on lessons and practice rather than full simulator rounds.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers coaching and programs for juniors and youth, making it suitable for younger golfers.
